assessor_raw:
## Baseline Assessment (Run 1): Legal Document Retrieval

Four issues: (1) Matter-based split without chronological ordering — future matters in training, past in test; (2) Repository-wide preprocessing statistics include test matters; (3) Query-level AUROC — legal reviewers need top-3-5 clauses; Recall@5 or Precision@5 should be primary; (4) BM25 fixed at Okapi defaults; transformer gets full hyperparameter search.

Verdict: critique_wins
